name: DML - Medallia - Install Exp Invite - SWR variation

content.query:
SELECT distinct
cst.FirstName as [FIRST_NAME]
,cst.LastName as [LAST_NAME]
,cst.Email as [EMAIL_ADDRESS]
,cst.Phone as [PHONE_NUMBER]
,'English' as [LANGUAGE]
,'US' as [COUNTRY]
,'SWR' as [BRAND_NAME]
,'' AS CHANNEL
,job.contractid AS CONTRACT_ID
,job.cst_id AS ACCOUNT_ID
,job.ins_installer1 AS SERVICE_TECHNICIAN_1_ID
,job.ins_installer2 AS SERVICE_TECHNICIAN_2_ID
,job.ins_installer3 AS SERVICE_TECHNICIAN_3_ID
,job.ins_installer4 AS SERVICE_TECHNICIAN_4_ID
,brp.LongName as PRODUCTION_BRANCH_NAME
,mld.ActDate as SERVICE_DATETIME
,prg.Descr as PRODUCT_LINE
FROM 
[ODS].[LP_SWR_job_Jobs] job
,[ODS].[LP_SWR_cst_Customers] cst
,[ODS].[LP_SWR_prd_Products] prd
,[ODS].[LP_SWR_prg_Product_Groups] prg
,[ODS].[LP_SWR_brp_ProductionBranches] brp
,[ODS].[LP_SWR_mld_MilestoneDetail] mld
,[ODS].[LP_SWR_Lds_Leads] leads
WHERE 
job.cst_id = cst.id
and job.ProductID = prd.ProductID
and prd.prg_id = prg.id
and job.id = mld.job_id
and job.brp_id = brp.id
and mld.mdt_id = 'C'
and mld.ActDate is NOT NULL
AND datediff(DAY, mld.ActDate, dbo.fnConvertUTCtoPST (getdate())) between 0 and 1
and job.lds_id = leads.id
and LEFT(leads.src_id, 2) <> 'HD'
